docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY CHUNG, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT EXCEL MATERIAL INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EXCEL MATERIAL INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHUNG, HENRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXCEL MATERIAL INC. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT EXCEL MATERIAL INC.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY KENNY KO, PRESIDENT OF EXCEL MATERIAL INC. HEARING SET FOR DEC-12-2002 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT EXCEL MATERIAL INC.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2002, OFF CALENDAR AS TO THIRD PARTY KENNY KO, PRESIDENT OF EXCEL MATERIAL INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT EXCEL MATERIAL INC.
